quick_skim.title: Lung-R1: A Knowledge Graph-Guided LLM for Pulmonary Diagnostic Reasoning
quick_skim.abstract: Diagnosing pulmonary diseases requires integrating heterogeneous evidence amid phenotypic variability and cross-disease overlap. Although large language models (LLMs) have shown progress on pulmonary knowledge question answering (QA) and information-processing tasks, reliable pulmonary diagnosis requires patient-specific, relation-aware reasoning over electronic medical record (EMR) evidence rather than isolated knowledge recall. We define this gap between pulmonary knowledge and case-level diagnostic reasoning as the Pulmonary Knowledge-to-Diagnosis Gap. To address it, we introduce LungKG, the first structured pulmonary knowledge graph for diagnostic knowledge organization and record-grounded reasoning. LungKG contains 59,038 nodes and 164,308 edges across 15 entity types and 112 relation types, serving as both a reusable pulmonary knowledge resource and the foundation for LungKG-guided model adaptation. Built on LungKG, we propose Lung-R1, a LungKG-guided pulmonary LLM trained through KG-constrained reasoning-chain construction and KG-guided reinforcement learning. In a 20-system evaluation, Lung-R1-14B achieves state-of-the-art performance across Choice, Pulmonary-QA, and EMR Diagnosis, reaching an EMR Diagnosis score of 4.3583 and surpassing the strongest non-Lung-R1 baseline by 0.1476 points. These results demonstrate the value of LungKG-guided training for EMR-based pulmonary diagnosis.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Knowledge graph-guided LLM for medical reasoning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 知识图谱引导的大语言模型用于医学推理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 知识图谱引导的大语言模型用于医学推理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 知识图谱引导的大语言模型用于医学推理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Lung-R1 builds a pulmonary knowledge graph to guide an LLM for diagnostic reasoning, demonstrating transferable biomedical KG-LLM methodology.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 肺部诊断需要整合多种证据，但大语言模型在病例级推理上表现不足。本文构建了首个结构化肺部知识图谱LungKG，并引导LLM进行诊断推理。该方法将医学知识与大语言模型结合，实现了病人特定的关系推理。尽管应用于肺部疾病，其知识图谱引导LLM的框架可迁移到药物相互作用预测，为冷启动DDI提供方法论借鉴。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 肺部诊断需要整合多种证据，但大语言模型在病例级推理上表现不足。本文构建了首个结构化肺部知识图谱LungKG，并引导LLM进行诊断推理。该方法将医学知识与大语言模型结合，实现了病人特定的关系推理。尽管应用于肺部疾病，其知识图谱引导LLM的框架可迁移到药物相互作用预测，为冷启动DDI提供方法论借鉴。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找ColdDDI：利用大型语言模型和生物医学知识图谱进行冷启动药物相互作用预测该方向有关的论文, especially work that connects or combines: Large Language Model + Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction; cold-start drug-drug interaction prediction; large language model for drug interaction; drug interaction prediction with knowledge graph; knowledge graph completion for drug discovery; cold start prediction in drug interaction; Cold start drug drug interaction prediction using large language models and biomedical knowledge graphs; Leveraging knowledge graphs for cold start drug interaction with large language models; Biomedical knowledge graph enhanced drug interaction prediction for new drugs.
